title: SingleLogicalConditionReportingConfig
description: SingleLogicalConditionReportingConfig: Config object containing settings for reporting results of checks against logical conditions with a single nested condition.

NestedConfig.description: Reporting config to be applied to format the check report of nested condition. IConditionReportingConfig: Top interface for all condition reporting config objects.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
